modelsCard.title: Models and storage
modelsCard.subtitle: Install or remove AI models to manage disk space. The model in use and the fallback cannot be removed.
modelsCard.pullFailed: Couldn't install "{{model}}". Check the name exists on Ollama or Hugging Face and that it fits on your machine.
modelsCard.protectedHint: Model in use or fallback, cannot be removed
modelsCard.installByNameHint: An Ollama model (e.g. gemma3:4b) or a GGUF repo from Hugging Face (hf.co/user/repo). For voice, a Whisper size or a CTranslate2 repo.

ragSettings.title: Search and multimedia
ragSettings.rerankerHint: Reorders results with a more accurate model. Boosts relevance by 5-10%.
ragSettings.useDoclingHint: Preserves tables, multi-column layout and OCR for scanned PDFs. ~30x slower than PyMuPDF.
ragSettings.doclingNotInstalled: Requires installing Docling (~2 GB: torch + transformers + models).
ragSettings.doclingInstalled: Docling installed. Toggle the switch to use it.
ragSettings.doclingError: Error installing Docling. Check backend logs.
ragSettings.indexMultimediaHint: Enables AI transcription and captioning. If off, only text and documents are indexed.
ragSettings.ocrQualityHint: Server models better detect stylised text (games, covers, WEBP). Downloads ~140 MB on first use.
ragSettings.whisperModelHint: Turns audio (and the soundtrack of videos) into searchable text. Larger models transcribe more accurately but are slower. To download other sizes, go to Models and storage.
ragSettings.visionModelHint: Generates a description of each image (and of video frames) so they can be found by their content.
ragSettings.llmModelHint: The one that writes answers in /ask. Smaller models run on GPU-less PCs, larger ones give better quality but need GPU/RAM.
ragSettings.autoFreeVision: Free the previous model when switching
ragSettings.autoFreeVisionHint: When you change the description model, uninstall the previous one to save disk. You'll have to download it again (~GB) if you switch back. The fallback model (moondream) is never removed. Off by default.
ragSettings.ingestPending: Saved. Will apply when the current ingestion finishes (not restarting so it isn't interrupted).
ragSettings.whisperCustomHint: Pick a size or type a Hugging Face repo (CTranslate2 format).
ragSettings.visionNoVisionWarning: This model does not declare vision capability. It may fail to describe images.
ragSettings.noInstalledModels: No installed models of this type. Install them under "Models & storage".
ragSettings.whisperDownloadError: Download failed. Check the backend logs.

devicePlanner.priorityHint: Affects CPU/GPU allocation when VRAM is limited. Choose based on your primary use case.
devicePlanner.prioritySearchDesc: Prioritises query latency. Keeps the GPU free for the LLM.
devicePlanner.priorityIngestDesc: Prioritises indexing speed. Embeddings run on GPU.
devicePlanner.embeddingsHint: Vector model for search. On GPU it speeds up indexing but uses a lot of VRAM.
devicePlanner.rerankerHint: Reranking cross-encoder. Lightweight, usually fine on CPU.
devicePlanner.whisperHint: Audio transcription. GPU speeds up long audio/video files.
devicePlanner.ocrHint: Text recognition in images. GPU helps with dense documents.
devicePlanner.llmHint: Response model run by Ollama. Runs faster on GPU when VRAM allows.
devicePlanner.visionHint: Image description model run by Ollama. GPU speeds up image and video ingestion.
devicePlanner.infeasibleBanner: This configuration does not fit in your {{vram}} MiB. Reduce the components set to GPU.

hardware.title: Hardware and performance
hardware.cpuByPlan: Processor (GPU available, managed by the performance plan)
hardware.error: Error during activation. Try restarting SeekPal manually.
hardware.indexingWarning: SeekPal is currently indexing files. Pause the indexing and apply changes?
hardware.autoHint: Detects the best engine for your hardware on each startup.
hardware.engineAdvancedHint: Installation is automatic (start.bat detects your GPU). Use this only as a fallback if there is an issue with the detected engine.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.subtitle: Scanned and indexed directories
sources.emptyState: No sources. Add a directory to get started.
sources.ingestAllTooltip: Index all files in this source from scratch
sources.updateTooltip: Index new, modified, and failed files
sources.deleteConfirm: Delete this source and all its indexed files?

search.title: Relevant documents
search.placeholder: Search documents by content or name...
search.subtitle: {{count}} relevant documents for "{{query}}"

landing.title: Search your files
landing.subtitle: Ask in natural language or search documents by content

ask.title: AI Answer
ask.placeholder: What do you want to know about your documents?
ask.noContext: I don't have enough information in the indexed documents.

error.ollamaDown: The AI model is not available. Make sure Ollama is running.
error.noIndex: No indexed documents. Index at least one source first.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Indexed files summary
stats.noData: No data. Index a directory first.

files.title: Indexed files
files.notFound: The file no longer exists at that path
